examples: They were really doing it artfully from behind the window curtains.
There is a row of artfully tatty shops—a palmist, a photo studio, a display of baby incubators.
Mal’akh had played his cards artfully within the Capitol Building, showing obeisance to all the ancient etiquettes.
The meal from appetizers to desert was not only favorable but artfully prepared and flawlessly served.
Under the guise of current events, Skolimowski artfully conjures an elemental archetype of human life itself.
